name: chapel
hints: This is the chapel where the final ritual must be performed. The coffin contains Count Cristo.
OPEN COFFIN to see the cursed Count. You will need specific items to break the curse.
The counter-spell requires the glowing idol, four-leaf clover, and the doll with pins removed.
With all items ready: YELL CHANT with the glowing idol, four-leaf clover, and doll (pins removed) to break the curse and win.

effects: Message: There's a CLAP OF THUNDER!
Message: Pins fall out of doll

notes: Chapel with Count Cristo's coffin - the location where the curse must be broken. YELL CHANT with the glowing idol, clover, and pin-free doll to complete the game. Central hub connecting to all major areas.
